name: Speed
definition: The distance in feet a creature can cover when moving on its turn
full_text: A creature has a Speed, which is the distance in feet the creature can cover when it moves on its turn.

mechanics.special_speeds: Burrow Speed, Climb Speed, Fly Speed, Swim Speed

special_mechanics.switching: Choose which speed to use when moving; can switch during move
special_mechanics.subtraction: Subtract distance already moved from new speed when switching
special_mechanics.zero_or_less: Can't use new speed if result is 0 or less

speed_changes.increases_decreases: Special speeds increase/decrease by equal amount
speed_changes.example: Speed reduced to 0 = Climb Speed also reduced to 0; Speed halved = Fly Speed also halved
